channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping on street, 11th March
item.description:
Flytipping on street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on County Grove, 11th March
item.description:
Cardboard boxes and rubbish bags dumped on County Grove. The road has quite a bit of litter on the Knatchbull Road and, could it be swept up please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): County Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on roundabout, 11th March
item.description:
Potholes
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to Tesco Southwark park Rd, 11th March
item.description:
2 black bags dumped, one very heavy. Beside the salt container.please remove? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste bins full of household waste, 11th March
item.description:
These 3 garden recycling bins need removing from outside 107 Foulden Road. Residents and passers by are using them to dispose of household waste. If the bins were not there the problem would not occur. The photo shows 2 of the three brown bind

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foulden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blown street light bulb, 10th March
item.description:
Within LB Wandsworth, the bulb in lamppost number L140 has blown. This lamppost is located at the edge of Tooting Common on the path between 94 Drewstead Road and the railway bridge. Please can you pass on this request to Wandsworth to fix it as soon as possible as this is a very dark and lonely path. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Drewstead Road, Streatham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned old child seat fitting, 10th March
item.description:
Has been there for over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tremaine Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cotmandene, 10th March
item.description:
This whole area looks awful but this road is full of litter and rubbish often dumped The street looks unloved and unkept Through street cleaning needs to be done here
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poo park, 10th March
item.description:
This park is full of dog poo People do not pick up after their dogs! Tried to take my little cousin there and it was not acceptable for children
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass, 10th March
item.description:
Glass over the pathway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left to pollute waterways, 10th March
item.description:
Rubbish not cleared up. Reported previously but issue not resolved. Littering a constant issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Statham Grove, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Underground carpark flooding, 10th March
item.description:
The car park under the flats on Spenser Grove has been flooding for weeks. The smell is awful. Warm weather has produced a huge amount of tiny flies and a smell that resembles sewage. The busted sewage pipe needs to be fixed and the garage fumigated.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Approach Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 10th March
item.description:
This issue has been going on for decades as Lemmon Road is a short cut to Greenwich Park for dog owners. Bags of faeces are regularly dropped randomly along the back and front pavements leading to Maze Hill. There are no notices asking dog owners to dispose of their bags thoughtfully and not to allow their dogs to foul the pavements. Please could this be remedied as dogs are even being let to foul where the children's play area is.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lemmon Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded flower pots and plants, 10th March
item.description:
These have been here for two weeks and we're dumped there by workmen who were working at no 37 Spenser Grove N16 8UA

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Approach Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal & plastic embedded in tarmac, 10th March
item.description:
Plastic and metal (steel wire) is embedded in the St Katherines Road carriageway following a van fire several months ago and causes a hazard to vehicles and vehicle tyres when driven over. Drivers will swerve across the carriageway to drive on the wrong side to avoid it, irrespective of oncoming traffic. A similar problem exists from an earlier vehicle fire in the parking bay in the corner approximately 100 yards to the north - although this one only affects anyone parking in the corner bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, St Katherines Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th March
item.description:
Various articles: kitchen bins, trellis and cabinets etc left at the side of garage no 25

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Smith Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown weeds and debris, 10th March
item.description:
Clearing the overgrown weeds coming from Maze Hill Railway land along Lemmon Road was started and a pile left on one of the few parking spots for over 4 weeks. Since then no sign of the rest of the overgrowth being removed which is taking over the road surface.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Smith Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate language daubed on to bus stop timetable, 10th March
item.description:
Inappropriate language daubed on to bus stop timetable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 289, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th March
item.description:
Large amount of dumped household items - a few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spray Street, Woolwich

item.title: Boxes & other matter dumped in Kent Road, 10th March
item.description:
These boxes are dumped alongside house number 25 Kent Road near the Swan public house thx
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Kent Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
